title: Respiratory virus detections in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Respiratory virus detections in Canada
The Respiratory Virus Detection Surveillance System (RVDSS) collects data from select laboratories across Canada on the number of tests  performed and the number of positive tests for up to 8 respiratory viruses.  Data are reported to the Centre for Emerging and Respiratory Infections and  Pandemic Preparedness (CERIPP) within the Public Health Agency of Canada. These data are  also summarized in the weekly FluWatch report.
Respiratory virus detection data are now available in an interactive  dashboard. Historical RVDSS reports are available in the archives  section of the current page below.
View interactive data
